name: historical_notes
Battle of Zela: Battle near Zela in Pontus: Pharnaces II tried to overrun Caesar's camp from high ground but veteran Roman counterattacks broke the Pontic army; Caesar later summarized the rapid campaign as "Veni, vidi, vici."

name: ROMAN
column4: absorb Pharnaces' sudden uphill assault and counterattack with veteran legions
column5: break the Pontic attack quickly and secure Caesar's eastern campaign

name: PARTHIAN
column4: launch Pharnaces' uphill assault from the Pontic camp and rely on mobile missile troops
column5: overrun Caesar's line before the veterans can regroup
